sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Upa khat zanlai Jesuh kiangah pai-a,
Gupna ngah nading khuavak lampi dong hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aman takin kong ci hi, kong hilh kik

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa Jesuh thu hilh kikna a pha hi,
A thupiakna a mawkna hilo ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A teel mite tawh lungdamin la sa ta,
Hin tawntung lungdam nuamna na ngah nop leh,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na muhnop mihingte vantung khuapi ah,
A siangtho kong biangah nang hong ngak
Tua bang na muh nang hih thupiakna ngai in,
